note: Company-page posts report link clicks (LinkedIn Pages API). Personal-profile posts do NOT expose per-post link clicks anywhere, and LinkedIn passes only a site-level 'linkedin.com' referrer (post blog links also go off-domain), so per-post profile clicks can't be attributed. Instead, the table below shows total website visits from LinkedIn measured in GA4 (7 YTD) and which pages they landed on.
